description: The sixth AMX/3 was Diomante's personal car, and it initally had the 360 V8 like the fifth car. For unknown reasons, Diomante had replaced the 360 with a 290 at some point in time, making it the slowest AMX/3 of the bunch. Diomante sold the car in 2022 to Simon Vels in The Netherlands.
creator: Johnny
